name: astrofree
description: Monorepo: Main (orchestrator) + Client (customer CMS on Cloudflare Pages/Worker + R2)

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:client
scripts.cf-typegen: npm run cf-typegen -w astrofree-main && npm run cf-typegen -w astrofree-client
scripts.check: npm run check -w astrofree-main && npm run check -w astrofree-client
